Deploying a deep learning model on AWS requires careful planning and execution. * * *  
Model training and validation are conducted on AWS EC2 instances, ensuring computational power and scalability. * * *  
Data security and model overfitting are critical considerations, requiring regular audits and validation techniques. * * *  
Model deployment involves using AWS SageMaker for production deployment, ensuring efficient scaling and performance. * * *
